question: How do I reset my account password?
answer: To reset your password, navigate to Settings > Security > Change Password. Enter your current password followed by your new password, then click Save changes.

question: What is the return policy for purchases?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. Items must be returned in their original packaging and unused condition to receive a full refund.

question: How can I contact technical support?
answer: You can reach our technical support team via email at support@techcorp.com or call our toll-free number 1-800-555-0199 available 24/7.

question: Do you offer international shipping?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. Shipping fees and delivery timelines vary depending on your location and will be calculated at checkout.
